SEVERAL ROADS AROUND TRANSYLVANIA COUNTY WERE CLOSED LATE THIS MORNING DUE TO FLASH FLOODING. WILSON ROAD ON THE EAST SIDE OF BREVARD WAS CLOSED. FLAT CREEK VALLEY ROAD WAS CLOSED AND THIS ROAD IS JUST EAST OF LAKE TOXAWAY. CASCADE LAKE ROAD IN THE SOUTHEAST PART OF THE COUNTY WAS CLOSED. GREEN ROAD BETWEEN BREVARD AND ROSMAN WAS CLOSED. ISLAND FORD ROAD AND HANNAH FORD ROAD WERE CLOSED AND THESE ROADS ARE BETWEEN BREVARD AND ROSMAN. THE TIME OF CLOSURE IS NOT EXACT.

CAMPER AT THE DEEP CREEK TUBE CENTER AND CAMPGROUND IS REPORTING DEEP CREEK IS OUT OF ITS BANKS AND FLOWING INTO CAMPSITES. CAMPERS ARE HAVING TO EVACUATE CAMPSITES. RAINFALL TOTALS OF 3-7 INCHES HAVE OCCURRED IN ABOUT A 3-HOUR PERIOD.

GREAT SMOKY MOUNTAIN NATIONAL PARK DISPATCH AND SWAIN COUNTY 911 REPORT DEBRIS FLOW OVER LANDS CREEK RD. NEAR LAKEVIEW DR. AT LEAST 4 TREES OVER 20 INCHES IN DIAMETER AMONG THE DEBRIS REPORTED. MUD OVER LANDS CREEK RD. 3-7 INCHES OF RAIN FELL IN A 3 HOUR PERIOD.

ACCORDING TO AN OFFICIAL RIVER GAUGE...MUD CREEK ROSE ABOVE THE FLOOD STAGE OF 7.5 FEET AROUND 4 AM AND THEN APPEARED TO CREST AT 7.98 FEET AT 535 AM. MUD CREEK FELL BELOW FLOOD STAGE AT 8 AM. ALTHOUGH SOME MINOR FLOODING WAS EXPECTED ON SOUTH KING STREET...SOUTH GROVE STREET AND THE SOUTH CENTER PLAZA...NO FLOODING WAS REPORTED.
